leadText: Not to be confused with Shady House. The Strange House (Japanese: ストレンジャーハウス Stranger House) is a lone house at the base of Reversal Mountain. The Strange House is actively haunted by the ghost of a young girl, the same one who appeared on Marvelous Bridge in Pokémon Black and White. This ghost intentionally arranges furniture to force the player to enter various rooms. The player is able to leave the house at any time, though. At the end, the player will find the Lunar Wing.
